Event: Gamer Hustle
Event Date: 01/09/2020
Sage Bot Item Code: A70


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Ghostly Aides

Triggers: Once in a while

The artifact wearer disappears from the battlefield for 5 sec, leaving 3 ghostly replicas behind in their place. The replicas deal 50% of the wearer’s weapon damage. After the replicas vanish, the artifact wearer reappears where one of the replicas was and deals 65000 damage to the nearest enemy.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
